CustomField.formula: IF(OR(Current_Lease_Start_Date__c = Lease_Start_date__c,AND(ISBLANK(Current_Lease_Start_Date__c),ISBLANK(Lease_Start_date__c))) , "", ("START DATE"&BR()))& IF(OR(Current_Lease_End_Date__c = Lease_End_Date__c,AND(ISBLANK(Current_Lease_End_Date__c),ISBLANK(Lease_End_Date__c))) , "", ("END DATE"&BR()))& IF(Current_Lease_Rent__c = Current_Rent__c , "", ("RENT"&BR()))& IF(Current_Lease_Increase_Year__c= Year_of_Last_COAH_increase__c , "",("INCREASE YEAR"&BR()))& IF(Current_Lease_Increase__c = Percent_last_COAH_increase__c , "",("INCREASE"&BR()))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Compares the lease data on the service file (rent, dates, %, etc.) with the current lease object attached to the service file below. If any text shows up, that signifies the fields are not matching up correctly
CustomField.label: Lease Data Check
